text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what on Earth is this?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That was a surprise... But what's this feeling? It's
not... bad, but... my chest feels warm.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I feel like I'm overflowing with energy!
